_readme: Signing-scheme conformance fixture — guards drift between the JS signer (doze-registry/scripts/lib.mjs) and the Go verifier (doze-sdk/modindex, doze-sdk/binaries).
The keypair is a THROWAWAY generated by doze-registry scripts/keygen.mjs for this fixture only — it has never signed a real release and must never be used to.
publicKey is the raw 32-byte ed25519 key, base64 (keys.json format); privateKeyPkcs8 is the matching PKCS8 DER, base64 (the DOZE_SIGNING_KEY format).

index is a signed schema-1 module index as produced by scripts/sign.mjs: each artifact sig is ed25519 over the lowercase-hex SHA256 string; the index signature is ed25519 over the hex SHA256 of the canonical payload (JSON, keys sorted, no whitespace).
Consumed by: doze-registry/scripts/conformance-check.mjs (bun run test:conformance) and doze-sdk/modindex/conformance_test.go (go test ./modindex/).
